title: Charge case outside screen/third screen, right zoom in/out
scenario: Verify zoom in/out functionality on the third screen (charge case outside) by clicking the circle button to zoom in and out, confirming new text appears and the screen returns to its original state.
steps: Click right circle button to zoom in (new text appears)
Click circle button again to zoom out (returns to original screen with charge case outside)
expected: Zoom in shows new text, zoom out returns to original screen with charge case outside.
